description: Author failing tests for the AI-merge worker (byte producer behind IPromptRunner via the NEW GUARDRAILS_MERGE_BASE/_OURS/_THEIRS/_OUT on-disk env contract; PromptResult.IsError/exit code NEVER a verdict): a fake AI runner writes canned merged bytes to _OUT and the union settles via re-verify; an out-of-bounds write is detected, discarded (reset --hard), needs-human; a left marker is detected, needs-human; budget exhausted after 1 retry → needs-human; and the load-bearing B-3 gate - an AI-deleted colliding-sibling hunk is caught because the colliding sibling's FULL guardrail set re-runs unconditionally
